name: Bulgur, Lentil & Tofu Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, cook the lentils in the stock along with the spices for about 25 minutes. Remove the bay leaf.
2. Heat the oil in a skillet. Add the carrot, garlic, onion, and tofu. Sauté for 5 minutes.
3. Add the corn and bulgur to the skillet. Stir to mix well.
4. Return the cooked lentils and cooking liquid to the skillet. Stir until combined.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased casserole dish.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
